finding: Associated with: dilated ventricle, sulci, fissures

differentials.name: NORMAL (increasing with age) Frequency:   22% between 0 and 20 years; 22% between 21 and 40 years; 51% between 41 and 60 years; 92% over 60 years
differentials.raw: NORMAL (increasing with age) Frequency:   22% between 0 and 20 years; 22% between 21 and 40 years; 51% between 41 and 60 years; 92% over 60 years

context: √  CSF density √  may show ring enhancement + compression of adjacent structures √  mass effect + contrast enhancement Periventricular T2-hyperintense Lesions Leukoencephalopathy = disease of white matter Leukodystrophy = degenerative diffuse sclerosis with symmetrical bilateral white matter lesions Histo:  reduced myelin, axonal loss, astrocytic gliosis Associated with:   dementia, gait abnormalities, late-onset depression
